rule_text: Infrastructure projects of value Rs.100 crore and above (undertaken by AP Government, AP Public Undertakings, JVs, SPVs, or PPP) must undergo Judicial Preview by a sitting/former High Court Judge prior to inviting tenders.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>=1000000000
verification_method: Check tender file for Judicial Preview certificate / Hon'ble Judge's approval issued before NIT publication date

rule_text: Lead Consortium Member in any Bidding Consortium for AP infrastructure projects must hold not less than 26% equity stake AND must hold the highest equity stake among all consortium members.
verification_method: Check consortium agreement: lead member equity_share >= 0.26 AND lead_member_equity == max(all_member_equity)

rule_text: An infrastructure project shall not be split, segregated, divided or tendered separately to evade the Rs.100 crore Judicial Preview threshold; any such part is deemed an integral part of the original project requiring preview.
verification_method: Check if same scope/site has multiple sub-tenders whose combined value >=100 cr; verify each was preview-cleared

rule_text: Government Agency or Local Authority must place all tender-related documents (NIT, BDS, GCC, SCC, technical specs, BOQ) before the Hon'ble Judge for projects of value Rs.100 crore and above.
verification_method: Check tender file contains acknowledgement/dated receipt from Judicial Preview Committee covering all tender documents

rule_text: AP Judicial Preview Act 2019 overrides any conflicting State Laws (Section 13).
verification_method: If state-law conflict found, Judicial Preview Act prevails — record override in audit trail
